name: World without bathrooms
description:
In this world, bathrooms were never invented, when people have to piss or shit, they just go on the floor or in their pants, some do other things with is, but any forms of public pissing or shitting are completely legal, and people often end up walking in piss and shit, sometimes you’ll see people slip in it.

You get to choose your origin in this world, and your gender and age
creator: Clashman
